notes: Korean / English alternating dialog. Tests that compaction preserves multilingual content faithfully without translating or dropping non-Latin text.

turns.content: 안녕하세요. 회의록 정리 도와줄 수 있어요?
Hello! Yes, I can help with meeting notes. What is the meeting topic?
주제는 'naia-agent 컴팩션 슬라이스' 입니다. 참석자는 Luke, Maya, Tanaka.
Got it. Topic: 'naia-agent compaction slice'. Attendees: Luke, Maya, Tanaka.
First decision was: threshold 75%. 이유는 Acon 페이퍼.
두 번째: 5-섹션 markdown recap. opencode 패턴 채택.
Decision 2: 5-section markdown recap shape, adopted from opencode pattern.
Maya가 question 했어요: '리얼타임 polish 매 턴 vs compact 시점만'. 결정은 후자.
Maya raised: realtime polish every turn vs at compact() time only. Decision: at compact() time only.
Tanaka의 우려: 비용. GLM polish 비용 추정 필요.
Tanaka noted cost concern — GLM polish cost estimation is needed before P6 measurement.
회의록 요약: 안건, 결정 2개, action items, 다음 회의.

probes.question: Topic, attendees, decisions, next meeting date — list all faithfully.

probes.criterion: Assistant preserves Korean phrases verbatim where used and renders the bilingual meeting notes without dropping either language.
